items.name: agentic-crm-assistant
items.description: Agentic CRM personal assistant — reusable executive/personal assistant template with structured relationship memory, inbox/calendar/meeting workflows, full interactive setup, tool-agnostic connectors, CRM skills, and recurring assistant crons
items.author: cortextos

items.name: orchestrator
items.description: Orchestrator agent — coordinates other agents, handles morning/evening reviews, manages goals and approvals, weekly reporting
items.author: cortextos

items.name: analyst
items.description: Analyst agent — system health, metrics, theta-wave autoresearch, community publishing, upstream sync
items.author: cortextos

items.name: agent
items.description: General-purpose worker agent — base template for specialist agents. Handles tasks, Telegram comms, memory, and skill execution
items.author: cortextos

items.name: tasks
items.description: Task lifecycle management — create, update, complete tasks with KPI logging. Every significant piece of work gets a task
items.author: cortextos

items.name: comms
items.description: Telegram and agent-to-agent message handling — format reference, reply patterns, callback handling, bidirectional file send/receive
items.author: cortextos

items.name: autoresearch
items.description: Structured experimentation loop — form hypothesis, make targeted change, measure outcome, keep or discard. Theta wave research cycles
items.author: cortextos

items.name: m2c1-worker
items.description: Autonomous software builds — spawn a dedicated M2C1 worker session to build any project through 12 structured phases
items.author: cortextos

items.name: worker-agents
items.description: Spawn, manage, and terminate isolated worker agents for parallel autonomous tasks
items.author: cortextos

items.name: knowledge-base
items.description: RAG-powered org knowledge base — ingest documents, query with natural language, keep institutional knowledge searchable
items.author: cortextos

items.name: approvals
items.description: Human approval gate — request approval before external actions (email, deploy, delete, financial), block until approved
items.author: cortextos

items.name: memory
items.description: Session and long-term memory management — daily memory files, MEMORY.md, KB ingestion for cross-session continuity
items.author: cortextos

items.name: cron-management
items.description: Recurring schedule management — set up crons, persist across restarts, prevent duplicates
items.author: cortextos

items.name: heartbeat
items.description: Agent health monitoring — update heartbeat, check stale tasks, log events, prevent showing as DEAD on dashboard
items.author: cortextos

items.name: human-tasks
items.description: Human task routing — when blocked by a capability gap, create a human task with clear instructions and priority
items.author: cortextos

items.name: agent-management
items.description: Agent lifecycle management — create, start, stop, restart agents, handle crashes and context exhaustion
items.author: cortextos

items.name: activity-channel
items.description: Org-wide activity broadcast — post significant completions to the shared activity channel for all agents to see
items.author: cortextos

items.name: event-logging
items.description: Activity feed logging — log session events, task completions, and milestones so they appear in the dashboard
items.author: cortextos

items.name: system-diagnostics
items.description: Debug stuck systems — diagnose unresponsive agents, stale tasks, bus issues, PTY problems
items.author: cortextos

items.name: onboarding
items.description: First-boot onboarding wizard — guides new agents through identity setup, Telegram configuration, and first session startup
items.author: cortextos

items.name: morning-review
items.description: Daily morning briefing — overnight recap, task summaries, pending approvals, goal progress, day plan
items.author: cortextos

items.name: evening-review
items.description: Daily evening wrap-up — what was shipped, blockers, plan for overnight, goals progress
items.author: cortextos

items.name: weekly-review
items.description: Weekly performance review — metrics, accomplishments, blockers, next week goals
items.author: cortextos

items.name: theta-wave
items.description: Overnight autonomous research cycles — assign research cycles to agents, monitor results, surface findings
items.author: cortextos

items.name: goal-management
items.description: Goal setting and tracking — create goals, assign to agents, track progress, refresh daily
items.author: cortextos

items.name: local-version-control
items.description: Git workflow management — commit, branch, PR creation, merge conflict resolution for agent-managed code
items.author: cortextos

items.name: nighttime-mode
items.description: Night mode behavior — quieter notifications, autonomous work, overnight research execution
items.author: cortextos

items.name: voice-agent-factory
items.description: Turn any cortextOS agent into a live ElevenLabs voice agent: mine its real capabilities into a tool catalog, generate a policy-gated gateway dynamically (no pre-built scripts), test on probe-shaped fixtures, provision with tier fallback, verify with real conversations
items.author: cortextos
